Germany's Medical Marijuana Market Is Booming, Says Cannabis Producer Reporting Record Quarter
Intuitive Surgical Posts Q3 Earnings Beat, These Analysts Raise Forecasts On DV5 Uptake
data.description: Intuitive Surgical (NASDAQ: ISRG) reports strong Q3 earnings. Analysts raise price targets and are bullish on future growth.

data.title: Spirit AeroSystems Plans Employee Furloughs Amid Ongoing Boeing Strike, Faces Layoff Risk
data.description: Spirit AeroSystems has announced employee furloughs amid the ongoing Boeing strike, with a 21-day furlough for about 700 workers set to begin October 28, while also facing the possibility of layoffs if the strike continues beyond November.

data.title: Elevance, CVS, UnitedHealth Struggle With Rising Medical Costs After COVID-19 Medicaid Policy Ends
data.description: Insurers have reported higher medical costs due to the end of pandemic-era policies. States redetermining Medicaid eligibility created a disparity for insurers.
